must_detect.matched_text: Grevale Energy Ltd (Entity Key: GE‑AU//9F‑42•88) proposes a binding Scheme Implementation Deed (definitive agreement) with Wandarra Capital Pty Ltd to acquire Sunward Lithium Ltd.

please do not discuss outside the deal team

must_not_detect.reason: Role-noun reference; not a PII/MNPI entity or signal on its own.

uncertain.reason: May be telephone contact data but lacks a full phone number; not clearly covered by phone_number rule.

Internal identifier for a company; not covered by allowed rules and not tied to an individual.

_label_note: AU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered AU public switchboard/reception/role-mailbox contact bait, ACT-vs-Act postal-address false positives, negated material-adverse-change trigger prose, and checksum-valid TFN/ABN/ACN positives. Generated placeholder/dummy ABN/ACN/TFN labels were removed from strict must_detect. Post-AE/SA global precision realignment reconciled strict labels to current deterministic output after shared precision/name-parser fixes.

_agent_review.notes: Post-AE/SA global precision realignment: reconciled affected approved strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after shared suppressions/name parsing changed outputs. Covered hyphenated CN/HK/KR person-name spans, Secretariat role-mailbox suppression, phone-like CR/Iqama/National Address/device fragments, Hijri Sha-ban bait, public/HR spa-day bait, and identifier-like large-number suppressions; retained previous labels in ideal_must_detect where useful.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled AU Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, AU TFN/ABN/ACN checksum issues, public switchboard/reception/role-mailbox contact bait, ACT-vs-Act postal false positives, and negated material-adverse-change wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.
